title: Fancy Hotbar (Blue)
description: Fancy Hotbar But Now Blue Color!
body:
This texture pack is a simple UI redesign that swaps the default Minecraft hotbar for a clean, blue, water-inspired look. It’s made for players who want their interface to feel calmer, smoother, and a bit more aesthetic without changing how the game actually plays.

The hotbar is styled around a water theme, using soft blue tones and gentle shading to give it a fresh and polished feel. The design is inspired by the look of water surfaces and reflections, keeping everything subtle and easy on the eyes. It fits naturally into Minecraft’s style while still standing out from the vanilla UI.

Just like the original version, this pack only changes the hotbar. No blocks, no items, no extra effects. Because of that, it’s lightweight and performance-friendly, and it works well alongside other resource packs. You can stack it with your favorite textures or shaders without worrying about conflicts or lag.

Visibility is still a top priority. The hotbar slots remain clear and readable, so you won’t have any trouble seeing what item you’re holding during combat, building, or exploration. The goal is to make the UI look better without sacrificing usability.

This blue hotbar is perfect for players who prefer cooler color palettes or water-themed setups. It also works great for content creators who want a clean, modern UI for recordings and screenshots. It’s a small change, but it adds a noticeable layer of style to everyday gameplay.

If you’re looking for a calm, water-inspired UI upgrade that stays true to Minecraft’s feel, this texture pack is an easy choice. Simple, clean, and easy to use — just drop it in and enjoy a more relaxing look every time you play.
